task: Compute runway capacity shortfall and delay exposure across three periods using only the embedded packet; produce a recovery sequence and actionable recommendations. Deliver an Excel workbook with executable formulas and an operations recovery brief in Markdown that includes intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around controlling thresholds (crosswind > 28 kt, deice_queue > 10), and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
